title: Set up React Hook Form with Zod validation
summary: Install react-hook-form and @hookform/resolvers, define Zod schemas, build validated forms with error messages, and integrate with server actions or API routes.
declaration: I will set up React Hook Form with Zod schema validation. This is the most widely-used pattern for complex forms in React/Next.js projects. If you need a simpler form without a library, say so before I begin.
